profile: Software Engineer bridging transaction-critical core systems with modern backend services. I focus on reliability, integration quality and stable performance when production load is high and failure costs are real.

highlights: Developed and maintained transaction-critical systems handling high-volume financial flows on IBM z/OS.
Integrated mainframe transaction paths with modern distributed services through stable interface contracts.
Improved reliability and traceability for production systems operating in regulated banking domains.
Designed and implemented Node.js APIs for data-intensive production workflows.
Built AWS deployment paths with emphasis on operational clarity and resilient service behavior.
